note: seq=60 (BRAIN-RANKED PROSPECT FEED). Redeploys atlas_handoff_export.py wired to ORDER BY the Smart Brain's closure expected-value (atlas.brain_ranking.ev, highest EV first) with freshness as the tiebreaker. Read-only LEFT JOIN, introspective (only joins if atlas.brain_ranking exists), fail-soft. Behaviour: while brain EV is uniform/absent (no real outcomes yet) freshness dominates -> identical ICP+real-time-first feed; the moment real demo/chat/convert outcomes flow into atlas.outcome_stats and the brain reprices, the 2,000/batch AUTO-FLIPS to highest-closure-first. Re-fetches + sha-verifies the patched exporter and kicks one run NON-BLOCKING (can't wedge the puller); the 10-min timer continues. py_compile clean, sha-pinned. Allowlist-safe.

steps.note: seq=60: brain-ranked handoff (ORDER BY brain EV, freshness tiebreaker); auto-flips to highest-closure-first when outcomes flow.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_handoff_export.py':'aae8f37f68c412b969cbeaf5ef7ec92da65f5b0777529ed06f696bd75ea25fbf'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-handoff-export.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-handoff-export.service']); print('brain-ranked handoff kicked')"
